overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from covered corridors to elevated walkways and narrow alleys, surrounded by holographic advertisements and vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: exits covered corridor into open elevated plaza with city view

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow covered corridor toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered walkway with exposed pipes
wall-mounted holographic advertisements with bright colors
rusted metal safety railing along the right side of the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered corridor with graffiti-covered walls and neon advertisements. The space is enclosed with a concrete ceiling, opening toward a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza overlooking neon-lit city streets

events.description: turns left while walking along the elevated walkway to follow the path

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking the neon-lit city streets below

entered.detail: night sky visible above the city buildings
busy street visible from the elevated position with wet pavement reflecting lights
tall buildings covered in bright neon signage and advertisements
single palm tree growing from the elevated platform
large horizontal advertising screen spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens to a wide elevated plaza with views of the neon-lit city below. The character walks along the edge, passing a palm tree, with the metal railing now at mid-distance and the open night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with food vendors and storefronts

events.description: passes by All Foods vendor with bright red signage and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and neon storefronts on the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor table near the All Foods vendor

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign reading HOTEL in blue and pink
bright red signage for All Foods vendor with cartoon mascot
outdoor tables and chairs in front of the food vendor
row of food stalls with illuminated menus

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the elevated walkway, now passing commercial storefronts including an All Foods vendor with outdoor seating. The sky becomes partially obscured by surrounding buildings as the path continues past various neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with vending machines and neon signs

events.description: descends from elevated walkway into narrow ground-level alley with vending machines
turns slightly toward a building entrance at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley toward a doorway entrance, passing various vending machines

notable_agents.action: woman in red outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red vending machine advertising BURRITO XXL with food images
blue postal service vending machine with illuminated interface
metal door with frosted glass at the end of the alley
tight concrete walls with graffiti and utility boxes

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow alleyway lined with vending machines including a prominent Burrito XXL machine. The space is enclosed by concrete walls with neon lighting. The character approaches a doorway at the end of the alley while passing a pedestrian in red.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a wide-open city plaza before descending back into a narrow, neon-lit alley. It begins within an enclosed concrete passage lined with graffiti and advertisements, moving steadily toward a bright exit. As the character emerges, the space expands into a vast elevated plaza under an open night sky, where the camera glides past a palm tree and along a metal railing overlooking the city below. The scene then shifts toward a row of commercial storefronts and an All Foods vendor, with the horizon gradually narrowing as surrounding buildings begin to obscure the sky. Finally, the camera descends from the walkway into a tight alleyway filled with vending machines and concrete walls, passing a pedestrian in red while approaching a distant doorway.
